race.comment: HAD IT ALL (9) has been right there in both outings this campaign and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky alley to be playing a major role in the finish. TOOBLOOS (13) strips fitter third-up from the break and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Solid top-three prospects. UNDER ARREST (5) was a touch disappointing last time out but the two placings prior were full of merit. Worth another chance. LOVE REBEL (10) finished second over 1200m at Sunshine Coast two back then just missed the frame last time out over 1300m at this track. Sure to make her presence felt.
